# DispatchTimeInterval.never

**Case**

No interval.

## Declaration

```swift
case never
```

## Discussion

Use this case to specify a time interval that never occurs. For example, specify this value for a timer’s repeat interval to prevent a timer from repeating.

## Enumeration Cases

- **DispatchTimeInterval.seconds(_:)**: A number of seconds.
- **DispatchTimeInterval.milliseconds(_:)**: A number of milliseconds.
- **DispatchTimeInterval.microseconds(_:)**: A number of microseconds.
- **DispatchTimeInterval.nanoseconds(_:)**: A number of nanoseconds.
title: DispatchTimeInterval.never
